name: Portuguese Chili Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Cooking oil or bacon drippings
8 oz Tomato sauce or tomato paste
Salt and pepper to taste (about 2 teaspoons salt)
Fresh parsley or bell pepper, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight if desired, then cook until tender.
2. Brown onion and garlic in oil.
3. Add ground chuck and brown lightly.
4. Add tomato sauce, cloves, chili powder, salt, pepper, parsley, and whole red pepper. Bring to a boil for 10-15 minutes.
5. Add the beans and cook for an additional 25 minutes or longer.
6. Serve with Portuguese bread.
